untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of realized volatility of factor returns and inverse volatility scaling mechanism. These are portfolio-level factor construction operations, not price-based technical indicators. The allowed indicator set contains only single-instrument price and momentum indicators (RSI, ATR, moving averages, etc.), but cannot express: (1) multi-factor realized volatility measurement, (2) dynamic position sizing scaled inversely to volatility, or (3) factor-level rebalancing logic. This is a systematic factor management strategy that operates at the portfolio/factor construction layer, not a price-action entry/exit rule.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) to approximate the volatility scaling concept, but this misrepresents the original signal which operates on factor return volatility across a portfolio, not individual security price volatility. A proper implementation requires custom volatility-managed portfolio construction logic outside standard backtesting indicators.
